name: flowstudio-power-automate
description: Power Automate build, debug, and operations toolkit via FlowStudio MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Give your AI agent portal-level visibility into Power Automate flows
interface.longDescription: The Graph API only returns top-level run status. Flow Studio MCP exposes action-level inputs, outputs, loop iterations, and nested child flow failures so your agent can diagnose issues, compare runs, and deploy fixes. Three bundled skills: power-automate-mcp (operations), power-automate-debug (diagnostics), power-automate-build (deploy flows from scratch).
defaultPrompt: Build a new flow that sends form data via email
